description: World Cup-only vault for Flap tax revenue, WorldCupViewer settlement checks, configurable market countdown timestamps, and Polymarket market metadata, and Guardian-only emergency recovery. Polymarket execution is off-chain/metadata-only in this MVP.

methods.name: description
methods.description: Dynamic vault status: revenue held plus latest World Cup settlement state.

outputs.name: summary
outputs.description: Human-readable vault status

methods.name: taxToken
methods.description: Read the configured Flap tax token address for this vault.

outputs.name: taxToken
outputs.description: Configured tax token address

methods.name: guardian
methods.description: Read the immutable Flap Guardian/backup operator address.

outputs.name: guardian
outputs.description: Guardian address that can always operate the vault

methods.name: worldCupViewer
methods.description: Read the WorldCupViewer contract address used as the BSC settlement truth source.

outputs.name: worldCupViewer
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer contract address

methods.name: operator
methods.description: Read the current day-to-day operator address.

outputs.name: operator
outputs.description: Current operator address

methods.name: totalRevenueReceived
methods.description: Read the cumulative BNB amount received through the payable receive hook.

outputs.name: amountWei
outputs.description: Total BNB revenue received, in wei

methods.name: lastSettlementMatchId
methods.description: Read the match/group/champion ID from the latest stored settlement refresh.

outputs.name: matchId
outputs.description: Latest settlement match ID

methods.name: lastSettlementTeamId
methods.description: Read the team ID from the latest stored settlement refresh.

outputs.name: teamId
outputs.description: Latest settlement team ID

methods.name: lastSettlementTeamName
methods.description: Read the team name from the latest stored settlement refresh.

outputs.name: teamName
outputs.description: Latest settlement team name

methods.name: lastSettlementResolved
methods.description: Read whether the latest stored settlement refresh was resolved.

outputs.name: isResolved
outputs.description: Whether the latest settlement result is resolved

methods.name: getWorldCupWinner
methods.description: Read the current 2026 FIFA World Cup champion result from Flap WorldCupViewer.

outputs.name: matchId
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer match ID

outputs.name: matchName
outputs.description: Human-readable match name

outputs.name: isResolved
outputs.description: Whether the oracle/viewer has settled this result

outputs.name: teamId
outputs.description: Winning team ID; 0 pending, 49 others, 50 draw

outputs.name: teamName
outputs.description: Winning team name, tie message, others, or empty while pending

methods.name: getGroupWinner
methods.description: Read a Group A-L winner from Flap WorldCupViewer. Group A starts at matchId 2; Group L is 13.

outputs.name: matchId
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer match ID

outputs.name: matchName
outputs.description: Human-readable match name

outputs.name: isResolved
outputs.description: Whether the oracle/viewer has settled this result

outputs.name: teamId
outputs.description: Winning team ID; 0 pending, 49 others, 50 draw

outputs.name: teamName
outputs.description: Winning team name, tie message, others, or empty while pending

methods.name: getMatchResult
methods.description: Read any WorldCupViewer match result by matchId.

outputs.name: matchId
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer match ID

outputs.name: matchName
outputs.description: Human-readable match name

outputs.name: isResolved
outputs.description: Whether the oracle/viewer has settled this result

outputs.name: teamId
outputs.description: Winning team ID; 0 pending, 49 others, 50 draw

outputs.name: teamName
outputs.description: Winning team name, tie message, others, or empty while pending

methods.name: getTeamName
methods.description: Resolve a WorldCupViewer team ID into a team name. Reserved: 49 = others, 50 = draw.

outputs.name: teamName
outputs.description: Team name or reserved label

methods.name: marketCount
methods.description: Return how many World Cup Polymarket mappings are stored.

outputs.name: count
outputs.description: Number of market mappings

methods.name: getMarket
methods.description: Read one stored Polymarket market mapping.

outputs.name: matchId
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer match/group/champion ID

outputs.name: teamId
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer team ID tied to this market

outputs.name: polymarketConditionId
outputs.description: Polymarket condition ID metadata

outputs.name: marketSlug
outputs.description: Polymarket market slug or URL path

outputs.name: label
outputs.description: Human-readable market label/thesis

outputs.name: matchStartTime
outputs.description: Configurable Unix timestamp for scheduled match start; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: bettingCloseTime
outputs.description: Configurable Unix timestamp when betting UI should lock; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: settlementEarliestTime
outputs.description: Configurable earliest timestamp to attempt refreshSettlement; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: active
outputs.description: Whether this mapping is currently active

methods.name: getMarkets
methods.description: Read a paginated list of Polymarket market mappings.

outputs.name: matchId
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer match/group/champion ID

outputs.name: teamId
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer team ID tied to this market

outputs.name: polymarketConditionId
outputs.description: Polymarket condition ID metadata

outputs.name: marketSlug
outputs.description: Polymarket market slug or URL path

outputs.name: label
outputs.description: Human-readable market label/thesis

outputs.name: matchStartTime
outputs.description: Configurable Unix timestamp for scheduled match start; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: bettingCloseTime
outputs.description: Configurable Unix timestamp when betting UI should lock; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: settlementEarliestTime
outputs.description: Configurable earliest timestamp to attempt refreshSettlement; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: active
outputs.description: Whether this mapping is currently active

methods.name: getMarketTiming
methods.description: Read the configurable countdown timestamps for one market. WorldCupViewer does not provide start/deadline times, so these values are operator-maintained metadata until an official schedule source is wired.

outputs.name: matchStartTime
outputs.description: Configurable Unix timestamp for scheduled match start; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: bettingCloseTime
outputs.description: Configurable Unix timestamp when betting UI should lock; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: settlementEarliestTime
outputs.description: Configurable earliest timestamp to attempt refreshSettlement; 0 if unknown

methods.name: setOperator
methods.description: Operator/Guardian: update the day-to-day operator. Guardian access is non-revocable backup control.

methods.name: upsertMarket
methods.description: Operator/Guardian: add or update a World Cup-only Polymarket mapping plus configurable countdown timestamps. This does not trade and does not fake official match times.

inputs.name: index
inputs.description: Existing index to update, or marketCount() to append

inputs.name: marketSlug
inputs.description: Polymarket market slug or URL path

inputs.name: matchStartTime
inputs.description: Configurable Unix timestamp for scheduled match start; 0 if unknown

inputs.name: bettingCloseTime
inputs.description: Configurable Unix timestamp when betting UI should lock; 0 if unknown

inputs.name: settlementEarliestTime
inputs.description: Configurable earliest timestamp to attempt refreshSettlement; 0 if unknown

methods.name: refreshSettlement
methods.description: Operator/Guardian: query WorldCupViewer and store the latest settlement snapshot for a match/group/champion, usually after settlementEarliestTime or a scheduled trigger.

inputs.name: matchId
inputs.description: 1 for champion, 2-13 for groups, or any WorldCupViewer match ID

outputs.name: matchId
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer match ID

outputs.name: matchName
outputs.description: Human-readable match name

outputs.name: isResolved
outputs.description: Whether the oracle/viewer has settled this result

outputs.name: teamId
outputs.description: Winning team ID; 0 pending, 49 others, 50 draw

outputs.name: teamName
outputs.description: Winning team name, tie message, others, or empty while pending

methods.name: recoverNative
methods.description: Guardian emergency only: recover BNB/tax revenue held by the vault if funds are stuck or the vault must be shut down. This must not bypass user claims in a future escrow version.

inputs.name: amountWei
inputs.description: Amount of BNB to recover, in wei

methods.name: recoverTaxToken
methods.description: Guardian emergency only: recover the configured Flap tax token from this vault if funds are stuck or the vault must be shut down. This only recovers taxToken, not arbitrary assets, and must not bypass user claims in a future escrow version.

inputs.name: recipient
inputs.description: Recipient that receives recovered tax tokens

vaultDataSchema.description: Launch WorldCupPolymarketVault with BSC WorldCupViewer, Guardian backup control, optional operator, and optional tax token address. Polymarket fields remain metadata; this factory must not imply direct Polymarket trading.

fields.name: taxToken
fields.description: Flap tax token address, or zero address if unknown at form time

fields.name: guardian
fields.description: Required Flap Guardian address with non-revocable backup operator permissions

fields.name: worldCupViewer
fields.description: Required BSC WorldCupViewer address used for settlement reads

fields.name: operator
fields.description: Optional initial day-to-day operator; zero address falls back to launcher

vaultDataSchema.factoryNotes: Factory stub should decode these same four launch fields, require non-zero Guardian and WorldCupViewer, deploy WorldCupPolymarketVault, and emit the vault address plus Guardian/operator/viewer. The launch UI must label Polymarket as metadata/off-chain execution only, not direct vault trading. Guardian is the only address allowed to call recoverNative/recoverTaxToken emergency recovery functions.

factory.name: WorldCupPolymarketVaultFactoryStub
notes: Decode vaultData as (taxToken, guardian, worldCupViewer, operator).
Require non-zero guardian and worldCupViewer before launch.
Keep guardian as permanent backup operator; operator can rotate but cannot remove guardian authority.
Do not claim or fake direct Polymarket trading; store Polymarket identifiers as metadata only.
